meta.title: The Reversion of Temperature-sensitive Mutants of Encephalomyocarditis Virus upon Serial Passage in Three Continuous Cell Lines

abstractHtml: Several temperature-sensitive mutants of encephalomyocarditis virus were serially passed numerous times in HeLa, L929 and BHK-21 cells. The reversion of most of the mutants occurred most rapidly in BHK-21 cells and least rapidly in HeLa cells.
